segments.text: Knocked down! Confirming the down throw into fair!
segments.original_text: 落としてさあこれしっかり確認下投げから空前

segments.text: Mashing out — down throw into bair — and the fair!
segments.original_text: さあ暴れはしっかり下投げ空後さあここは空前

full_text: Knocked down! Confirming the down throw into fair! Mashing out — down throw into bair — and the fair!
